to help diagnose 429 rate-limit errors. Also properly parses Cloud Run
native error objects vs our API string errors.

commit.message:
fix(sync): repair orphan faces + full cache invalidation in resync

Two bugs fixed in /api/sync/resync-supabase:

1. Orphan face repair: Finds faces in photo_index that have no
   identity record and creates INBOX identities for them. This
   fixes Create Identity returning 404 on recently uploaded photos
   where the ingest pipeline failed to create the identity.

2. Cache invalidation: Already committed in previous commit but
   included here for completeness — uses _invalidate_all_caches()
   instead of just _photo_registry_cache = None.

fix(mneme): eliminate unwrap() in native mneme code (#716)

## Summary

Eliminates all `unwrap()` calls from native mneme code
(`crates/mneme/src/` excluding `engine/`).

**Finding:** The library code was already clean — all ~759 `unwrap()`
calls were confined to `#[cfg(test)]` blocks. Each was replaced with
`.expect("descriptive message")` per project convention.

### Files changed (9 commits)

| File | Unwraps fixed | Notes |
|------|--------------|-------|
| `store.rs` | 175 | Test code only |
| `import.rs` | 99 | Test code only |
| `export.rs` | 83 | Test code only |
| `retention.rs` | 76 | Test code only |
| `backup.rs` | 73 | Test code only |
| `skill.rs` | 41 | Test code only |
| `knowledge_store.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `embedding.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `extract.rs` | 35 | Test code only |
| `knowledge.rs` | 34 | Test code only |
| `migration.rs` | 21 | Test code only |
| `portability.rs` | 12 | Test code only |
| `types.rs` | 10 | Test code only |
| `schema.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query_rewrite.rs` | 3 | Test code only |
| `recall.rs` | 2 | Test code only |
| `hnsw_index.rs` | 1 | Test code only |
| `skills/extract.rs` | 8 | Test code only |

No new snafu error variants needed — library code was already using
proper `.context()` propagation throughout.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo fmt --check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` —
zero warnings
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 547 passed, 0 failed
- [x] Zero `unwrap()` in non-engine `crates/mneme/src/` (verified with
grep)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

refactor(mneme): replace BoxErr with StorageError snafu enum in storage/ (#710)

## Summary

- Introduces `StorageError` snafu enum with five typed variants:
`TransactionFailed`, `WriteInReadTransaction`, `CorruptedData`, `Io`,
`KeyEncoding`
- Adds `StorageResult<T>` alias and converts all `Storage`/`StoreTx`
non-iterator method signatures
- Converts all four backends: redb, fjall, mem, temp — eliminating all
`bail!`/`miette!` macro calls from `engine/storage/`
- Replaces all `unwrap()` in non-test storage code with documented
`expect("reason")` calls
- Iterator-returning trait methods keep `DbResult` items at their
boundary; `StorageError → BoxErr` conversion via std blanket `From` impl
at `?` sites

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb` — clean

mneme-engine,storage-redb` — 878 passed, 0 failed
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb --all-targets -- -D warnings` — zero new
errors in `engine/storage/` (29 pre-existing dead_code errors in
`expr.rs`/`program.rs` present on `main` unchanged)

commit.message:
chore(mneme): CSR module cleanup — unsafe audit, tests, error handling (#706)

## Summary

- **Removed unsafe**: The single unsafe block in `Csr<()>::targets()` (a
`slice::from_raw_parts` cast from `Target<()>` to `u32`) is replaced
with a safe iterator: `.iter().map(|t| t.target)`. The
`#[expect(unsafe_code)]` suppression and `debug_assert_eq!` size check
are no longer needed and are removed.
- **`Default` for `CsrBuilder`**: Added `impl<EV> Default for
CsrBuilder<EV>` and delegated `new()` to it, fixing the
`clippy::new_without_default` lint.
- **Caller updates**: `out_neighbors` and `in_neighbors` now return
`impl Iterator<Item = u32> + '_` instead of `std::slice::Iter<'_, u32>`.
Updated four callers: `page_rank.rs`, `top_sort.rs`,
`strongly_connected_components.rs`, `triangles.rs`.
- **Tests**: Added `#[cfg(test)]` module in `csr/mod.rs` covering:
construction (empty, triangle, multi-edge), degree queries, out/in
neighbor iteration, weighted edge access, and PageRank on triangle and
star graphs.

## Validation

- `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme --features mneme-engine,storage-redb` ✓
- `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 547 passed, 0 failed ✓
- `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✓

## Test plan

- [ ] CI passes all checks
- [ ] Reviewer confirms unsafe is gone from `csr/` module
- [ ] New tests visible in
`crates/mneme/src/engine/fixed_rule/csr/mod.rs`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Cody Kickertz <cody@forkwright.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: editar cotizacion no borra original + quitar boton Emitida

Bug fix — editarCotizacion() marcaba REEMPLAZADA al instante:
- Antes: all[idx].estado='REEMPLAZADA' ocurría al hacer click en Editar,
  antes de que el ejecutivo guardara. Si cerraba sin guardar, la cotización
  original desaparecía de la lista activa sin tener reemplazo.
- Ahora: el marcado REEMPLAZADA se hace en guardarCotizacion() solo cuando
  el ejecutivo efectivamente guarda la nueva versión (originalId capturado
  antes de limpiar _editandoCotizId).
- Bonus: limpiarCotizador() ahora limpia _editandoCotizId para cancelar la
  edición si el ejecutivo abandona el formulario sin guardar.

UX — botón Emitida eliminado del estado EN EMISIÓN en lista Cotizaciones:
- La cotización pasa a EMITIDA automáticamente al registrar el cierre
  (guardarCierreVenta), por lo que el botón manual ya no tiene sentido
  con el nuevo flujo Panel de Espera + cierre directo desde EMISIÓN.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(checkpoints): resolve Meta campaign IDs via substring match + fix CRM date range

commit.message:
Hide always_on sections from right panel toggles

Permanently-on sections cannot be toggled off, so showing them in the
SECTIONS toggle list is misleading. They are now skipped in the loop.
If an always_on section also happens to be the primary, it still shows
with the "Primary" badge (no toggle). Always_on sections remain
navigable via pill nav — only the toggle UI is removed.

Initial section state on profile creation (primary + always_on only)
was already correct in Onboarding::process_form() — no change needed.

feat(mcp): improve external MCP server configuration and management (PUNT-213) (#405)

## Summary

- **Rich server details**: Extract token expiry info from OAuth
credentials and surface it in the API and UI
- **Status indicators**: Colored dots (green/red/gray) and badges show
each server's state (enabled, expired, disabled)
- **Token expiry warnings**: Banner alert when any OAuth tokens have
expired, with guidance on how to fix
- **Credential filtering**: Only pass enabled server OAuth tokens to
Claude CLI, ensuring disabled servers are truly blocked
- **Empty state**: Helpful instructions when no external MCP servers are
found in credentials
- **Counter badge**: Shows enabled/total count in section header

## Test plan

- [x] Upload Claude CLI credentials that include `mcpOAuth` entries and
verify servers appear with status indicators
- [x] Verify expired tokens show red status dot and "Expired" badge
- [x] Toggle servers on/off and confirm the count badge updates
- [x] Verify that when no external MCP servers exist in credentials, the
empty state message appears
- [x] Confirm the built-in `punt` server always shows as enabled with
green dot
- [ ] Remove credentials and verify all MCP server state is cleared

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

anything the hook didn't already catch.

feat: Add comprehensive partner manual invoice creation system

Major Features:
✅ Complete invoice creation page for partners
✅ Service selection from partner's catalog
✅ Real-time total calculation with tax and discounts
✅ PDF generation for manual invoices
✅ Professional UI with animated components

Invoice Creation Page includes:
- Customer information form (name, email, phone, address)
- Searchable service selector with partner's own services
- Dynamic quantity adjustment for each service
- Live subtotal, discount, tax (13% HST), and total calculation
- Payment terms and due date configuration
- Notes/terms section
- Create & Download PDF button
- Save as Draft option
- Professional summary sidebar

Service Selection Features:
- Modal with search functionality
- Shows all active partner services
- Real-time filtering
- Service details (price, description, category)
- Quantity controls (±0.25 increments)
- Line item totals
- Remove service option

Benefits to Partners:
1. Process walk-in customers independently
2. Handle phone orders immediately
3. Generate professional PDF invoices
4. Use custom pricing from their service catalog
5. Track all invoices in one dashboard
6. Send invoices via SMS
7. Better customer service
8. Increased business autonomy

Technical Implementation:
- Added PartnerCreateInvoice.jsx component
- Integrated with partner_invoices database table
- PDF generation via existing downloadInvoice utility
- Proper routing under /partner-portal/invoices/create
- Create Invoice button on invoices page
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion animations
- Form validation and error handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

サイドバーに蔵書検索ボックスを追加（全ページ共通・JS動的挿入）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sync): backfill upload_date on photos missing it during resync

Photos uploaded before the cont6 BUG-1 fix had their upload_date
wiped when the broken Supabase sync read from Postgres (no upload_date)
and wrote back to JSON. The resync endpoint now:
1. Detects photos missing upload_date
2. Sets current timestamp as fallback
3. Persists to volume JSON so it survives restarts
4. Invalidates photo registry cache

This fixes "Upload Date (Newest)" sort showing recently uploaded
photos at the bottom instead of the top.

- 최근15일 탭 추가 (전체보기 왼쪽)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tests): upgrade fastapi to 0.110.0 to fix TestClient error

fastapi 0.109.0 pulls starlette 0.35.x which still passes app= to
httpx.Client. That kwarg was removed in httpx 0.23.0, causing:
  TypeError: Client.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'app'

fastapi 0.110.0 pulls starlette>=0.36.3 which uses transport= instead.
Also pin httpx>=0.23.0 explicitly.
